title: ‘From Gaza to Minab’: Iran shares image of hundreds of graves being dug after 160 dead in school strike
summary_full: Iran's foreign minister shared a photo of graves, alleging a US-Israeli strike on a girls' school in Minab killed over 150. Iranian authorities described it as a war crime, while the US Central Command stated they are reviewing reports of civilian harm. International law prohibits direct targeting of civilian infrastructure like schools.
